calculation.scoring: Sum scores for badges not in a family, plus only the highest score badge per family.
calculation.cardRarity: Look up totalScore in SCORE_PERCENTILES, then compare against card percentile thresholds.

badges.label: Palindrome
badges.description: Reads the same forwards and backwards.

badges.label: Heavy
badges.description: The sum of its digits exceeds 45.

badges.label: Feather
badges.description: The sum of its digits is less than 15.

badges.label: Grounded
badges.description: The first digit is smaller than the last.

badges.label: Liftoff
badges.description: The first digit is larger than the last.

badges.label: Equilibrium
badges.description: The first and last digits are identical.

badges.label: Turtle
badges.description: All consecutive digits differ by at most 1.

badges.label: Firefly
badges.description: One unique digit among identical others.

badges.label: Echo
badges.description: The first half repeats as the second half.

badges.label: Sandwich
badges.description: First and last digits match, with at least one different digit between them.

badges.label: Bookends
badges.description: The first two digits match the last two.

badges.label: Ascension
badges.description: Every digit is strictly larger than the previous.

badges.label: Decay
badges.description: Every digit is strictly smaller than the previous.

badges.label: Cascade
badges.description: Every digit increases by exactly 1 from the previous.

badges.label: Waterfall
badges.description: Every digit decreases by exactly 1 from the previous.

badges.label: Mountain
badges.description: Digits ascend to a peak and then descend.

badges.label: Valley
badges.description: Digits descend to a trough and then ascend.

badges.label: Hills
badges.description: Digits strictly alternate between rising and falling.

badges.label: Rhyme
badges.description: Contains the same 2+ digit substring twice.

badges.label: Alternator
badges.description: Digits strictly alternate between even and odd.

badges.label: Hopscotch
badges.description: A digit appears at every other position (2 times).

badges.label: Double Hop
badges.description: A digit appears at every other position (3 times).

badges.label: Framed Pair
badges.description: A 4-digit number where the middle two digits match each other but differ from both end digits.

badges.label: Framed Triple
badges.description: A triple in the middle, bookended by different digits.

badges.label: Framed Double
badges.description: Two pairs in the middle, bookended by different digits.

badges.label: Fibonacci Number
badges.description: Part of the golden ratio sequence found in nature.

badges.label: Harshad Number
badges.description: Divisible by the sum of its own digits.

badges.label: Spy Number
badges.description: The sum of its digits equals the product of its digits.

badges.label: Pronic Number
badges.description: The product of two consecutive integers (n * n+1).

badges.label: Pair
badges.description: Contains a pair of matching digits.

badges.label: Contiguous Pair
badges.description: Contains a contiguous pair of matching digits.

badges.label: Two Pair
badges.description: Contains two distinct pairs of matching digits.

badges.label: Three Pair
badges.description: Contains three distinct pairs of matching digits.

badges.label: Full House
badges.description: Contains a set of three and a set of two.

badges.label: Contiguous Full House
badges.description: Contains a contiguous set of three adjacent to a contiguous set of two.

badges.label: Straight
badges.description: Contains a sequence of 5 consecutive digits (ascending or descending).

badges.label: Flush
badges.description: All digits are either all even or all odd.

badges.label: Straight Flush
badges.description: Contains 5 consecutive same-parity digits (02468, 13579, or their reverse).

badges.label: Snake Eyes
badges.description: Contains a single pair of ones and no other pairs.

badges.label: Sequence (3)
badges.description: Contains a sequence of 3 consecutive digits.

badges.label: Sequence (4)
badges.description: Contains a sequence of 4 consecutive digits.

badges.label: Sequence (6)
badges.description: Contains a sequence of 6 consecutive digits.

badges.label: Scramble
badges.description: All digits form a consecutive sequence when sorted.

badges.label: Neighbors
badges.description: Contains two digits that are adjacent in value.

badges.label: Gap One
badges.description: The first and last digits differ by exactly 1.

badges.label: Even Spacing
badges.description: All digits are evenly spaced in an arithmetic sequence.

badges.label: Even Spacing (Absolute)
badges.description: All digits have the same absolute spacing (e.g., ±2 each time).

badges.label: Mirror Bookends
badges.description: First two digits are reversed as the last two.

badges.label: Paired Bookends
badges.description: Starts with a pair and ends with a different pair.

badges.label: Balanced
badges.description: Sum of first half of digits equals sum of second half.

badges.label: Strobogrammatic
badges.description: Looks the same when rotated 180 degrees.

badges.label: 4 Consecutive Numbers
badges.description: The entire number splits into four consecutive integers in order.

badges.label: 4 Consecutive Numbers (Scrambled)
badges.description: The entire number splits into four consecutive integers, but not in order.

badges.label: 3 Consecutive Numbers
badges.description: The entire number splits into three consecutive integers in order.

badges.label: 3 Consecutive Numbers (Scrambled)
badges.description: The entire number splits into three consecutive integers, but not in order.

badges.label: 2 Consecutive Numbers
badges.description: The entire number splits into two consecutive integers.

badges.label: 2 Consecutive Numbers (Contains)
badges.description: Contains two adjacent substrings that are consecutive integers.

badges.label: 2 Consecutive Numbers (Nearby)
badges.description: Contains two non-adjacent substrings that are consecutive integers.
